case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. NAVARRO J BROOKS et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT NAVARRO BROOKS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. NAVARRO BROOKS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
